title: Warm White Slovakian Lardons Stew
description: A hearty, mustardy stew featuring white chocolate chips and lardons-render, perfect for a hangover cure, this Slovakian dish is plant-based friendly and served in a hot pot vessel.
instructions: In a large hot pot vessel, heat the lardons over medium heat until crispy.
Remove the crispy lardons from the vessel and set aside.
Add the chopped onion to the vessel and cook until translucent.
Add the minced garlic to the vessel and cook for 1 minute.
Add the chopped carrots and potatoes to the vessel and cook for 5 minutes.
Add the vegetable broth, mustard, and white chocolate chips to the vessel and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 20 minutes.
Add the crispy lardons back to the vessel and stir to combine.
Serve the stew hot, garnished with additional white chocolate chips if desired.
